docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,212.00 FILED BY PATELCO CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT MCBRIDE  CARRIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-20-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO MCBRIDE CARRIE RETURNED, UNABLE TO FORWARD.
